title: Mostacillastrum dianthoides
taxonomy: Mostacillastrum dianthoides is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It belongs to the genus Mostacillastrum. This plant is native to South America. Mostacillastrum dianthoides is a relatively lesser-known species within the Brassicaceae family. Further classification and taxonomy of this species may be found in botanical literature.
